elements.description: 'ลาดเอียง 1:200' floor slope arrow directing drainage diagonally across the room, from upper-left toward the WC.1 fixture area

Hexagon '3' tagged callouts (appearing at left, right, and far-right of the plan) -- likely window/vent references matching the door/window schedule's W3 awning window type

warnings: This sheet (A-15) is dedicated entirely to WC.1 -- this house has a separate dedicated sheet per bathroom: A-15=WC.1 (this page), A-16=WC.2, A-17=WC.3 (per the index, not yet read at time of writing this file).
One of 2 views on this page; sibling is the section view _view2_wc1_section.json.
Cross-references the ground-floor plan (หน้า06, element 'ห้องน้ำ1_ground') which showed the same '3 +0.50 2' box and 'WC1 A-15 ดูแบบขยาย' callout -- consistent.

Grid references (grid3-grid4, near gridD) are inferred from the room's plan position relative to the ground-floor plan, not printed as explicit grid_refs on this detail sheet itself (only local dimension chains are printed here at 1:25 scale).
This sheet is A-15 (not A-16 as in house #4) since this house has only 2 sections (A-11, A-12) instead of 3, shifting every later sheet number down by 1.
